generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartStepperDrive : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart motor stepper drive controlled via TMC4671‑Eval controller"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller that commands the cart stepper drive"
]

instance HoistStepperDrive : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist motor stepper drive controlled via TMC4671‑Eval controller"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller that commands the hoist stepper drive"
]

instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for picking up containers"
]

instance ArduinoControlBoard : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino board handling sensor data acquisition and actuator commands"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder measuring the hoist’s swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer sensing wind speed around the crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Combined position and velocity sensors measuring motor positions and velocities"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionVelocityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance PositionVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionVelocitySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CADFusionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created in Autodesk Fusion360 representing the physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADVisualizationEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the trajectory generator to compute optimal motions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationServiceEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of the crane and its controllers for trajectory verification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationServiceEnabler
]

instance ContinuousValidationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model that provides distance metrics between executed and simulated trajectories for validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationServiceEnabler
]

instance FaultDetectionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Time‑series classification model for fault detection based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionServiceEnabler
]

// C10: Data
instance SwingAngleTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series logs of swing angle measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series logs of wind speed measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionVelocityTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series logs of motor positions and velocities stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionVelocityDataTransmitted
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance for storing time‑series data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that applies the kinematic model to generate optimal trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that runs the simulation model for trajectory verification"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that executes the continuous validation model"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance FaultDetectionServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that applies the fault detection model to sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for inter‑service messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService,
                 SimulationService,
                 ContinuousValidationService,
                 FaultDetectionService,
                 DataLoggingService,
                 DashboardService,
                 AlertingService
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates optimal trajectories for the crane using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryGenerationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that simulates the crane and its controllers for verification"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that continuously validates executed trajectories against simulated ones using distance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAssessmentInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that detects faults via time‑series classification of sensor logs"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that logs all time‑series sensor data, commands, trajectories, and simulation predictions into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization service exposing data and insights through Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance AlertingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated alerting service that triggers alerts when validation thresholds are violated or faults detected"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight,
                 AutomatedAlertAction
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that analyzes historical data and fault detection results to recommend adjustments or maintenance actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides RecommendationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance TrajectoryGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory plan generated by the kinematic model"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation predictions of crane motion for comparison with real executions"
]

instance ValidationAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of trajectory validation based on distance metrics between executed and simulated paths"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults identified through time‑series classification of sensor data"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical trend analysis of crane performance extracted from time‑series logs"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of crane state and analytics via Grafana dashboard"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating that validation thresholds were violated"
]

instance AutomatedAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically sends alerts to operators when threshold violations occur"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for trajectory adjustments or maintenance actions based on analysis"
]

// C11: Additional Enabler for visualization (optional)
instance CADVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that provides CAD visualization of the crane to the dashboard service"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

// C17: Environment
instance CraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepperDrive,
                 CartMotorController,
                 HoistStepperDrive,
                 HoistMotorController,
                 ElectromagnetActuator,
                 ArduinoControlBoard
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin generates optimal trajectories and sends motion commands through the MQTT broker to the Control Application, which drives the cart and hoist motors via the motor controllers; notification messages are also published to the operator dashboard."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All services operate in real time: sensor data is logged continuously at the sampling rate of the controllers, trajectory generation and validation run synchronously with the crane operation, and alerts are raised immediately when validation thresholds are breached."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system is an orchestrated ensemble of the physical crane (hardware and controller), the Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Human‑Machine Interface, and the twin side comprising the TimescaleDB database, Grafana dashboard, Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, and MQTT broker—all deployed via Docker Compose and communicating over TCP/IP and MQTT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin encompasses the as‑designed phase (CAD and kinematic models), the as‑manufactured phase (physical crane built from BOM), and the as‑operated phase (runtime data, validation, and maintenance monitoring during operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation compares measured trajectory data with simulation predictions using distance metrics; thresholds trigger alerts; simulation uses kinematic model validated against real motion to achieve swing‑free trajectories; time‑series classification is applied to detect faults; all models are open‑source and periodically verified through research publications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between the physical system and the digital twin uses a Python interface that streams sensor data and commands over TCP/IP sockets to the MQTT broker (Eclipse Mosquitto) and to a TimescaleDB database; all containers communicate over Docker networking; the controller is connected via serial or USB to the host PC."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The twin runs locally on a personal computer, with all services containerized in Docker; deployment is managed by a docker‑compose file that automatically bootstraps the TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard; the repository is hosted on GitHub and documentation is served via MkDocs on GitHub Pages."
]
